'''Kayso''' was a pirate and leader of the [[Black Hole Gang/Legends|Black Hole Gang]]. He was not a very capable leader, and kept much of the group's spoils to himself. When this was discovered, he was killed by [[Amaiza Foxtrain/Legends|Amaiza Foxtrain]], who took his place as leader.
